code: /* Home.js (updated styling, preserved logic) */import React from'react';import{Link as RouterLink}from'react-router-dom';import{Box,Button,Heading,HStack,VStack,Text}from'@chakra-ui/react';import{Helmet}from'react-helmet-async';import'./Home.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function Home(){return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Box,{py:16,textAlign:"center",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Helmet,{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("title",{children:"Home \u2022 Student\u2013Teacher Portal"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("meta",{name:"description",content:"Welcome to the Student\u2013Teacher Portal"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(VStack,{spacing:6,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Heading,{size:"2xl",children:"Welcome to Student\u2013Teacher Portal"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Text,{color:"gray.600",_dark:{color:'gray.300'},children:"Choose your role to continue"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(HStack,{spacing:4,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Button,{as:RouterLink,to:"/student",size:"lg",children:"Student"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Button,{as:RouterLink,to:"/teacher",size:"lg",variant:"outline",children:"Teacher"})]})]})]});}export default Home;
